title: Device Home Screen - Multiple devices - Turning off devices
scenario: Multiple paired Poly Bluetooth headsets show correct disconnect status in Poly Studio Mobile app when each device is turned off one by one
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Pair and connect multiple Poly Bluetooth headsets (e.g., Device A, Device B, Device C) to the app via the Home screen.
3. Verify that all devices appear as connected on the Home screen.
4. Power off Device A by pressing and holding its Power button.
5. Observe the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Power off Device B by pressing and holding its Power button.
7. Observe the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Power off Device C by pressing and holding its Power button.
9. Observe the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: When Device A is powered off, it should display as disconnected in the app while Device B and Device C remain connected. When Device B is powered off, it should display as disconnected while Device C remains connected. When Device C is powered off, it should display as disconnected. All remaining devices should stay connected until they are individually turned off.
